explanation: Monopoly, Chess, Clue, and Risk are all well-known classic board games. Poker, while a classic game, is a card game rather than a board game.

category: Classical Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza, Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Colossus of Rhodes, and Lighthouse of Alexandria are four of the seven traditional Wonders of the Ancient World. The Great Wall of China, while an ancient marvel, is not included in this classical list, often being cited as one of the New7Wonders.
Void, Chasm, Null, and Absence all denote a lack, emptiness, or non-existence. Surplus, however, signifies an excess or an amount remaining after needs are met.
